mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, login_log_id, account_id, login_type, login_result, ip_address, user_agent
mapper.select: select from login_logs where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from login_logs where login_log_id = #{loginLogId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from login_logs
order by id desc

select from login_logs
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into login_logs (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, login_log_id, account_id, login_type, login_result, ip_address, user_agent) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{loginLogId}, #{accountId}, #{loginType}, #{loginResult}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent})

insert into login_logs (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, login_log_id, account_id, login_type, login_result, ip_address, user_agent) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.loginLogId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.loginType}, #{item.loginResult}, #{item.ipAddress}, #{item.userAgent})
mapper.update: update login_logs set account_id = #{accountId}, login_type = #{loginType}, login_result = #{loginResult}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, user_agent = #{userAgent}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update login_logs set account_id = #{accountId}, login_type = #{loginType}, login_result = #{loginResult}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, user_agent = #{userAgent}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where login_log_id = #{loginLogId}

update.foreach: update login_logs set account_id = #{item.accountId}, login_type = #{item.loginType}, login_result = #{item.loginResult}, ip_address = #{item.ipAddress}, user_agent = #{item.userAgent}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where login_log_id = #{item.loginLogId}
